subcodes.title: Words to some Jewish visitors, spoken on 1912-10-07
subcodes.first_line: The day and age promised by the divine Prophets has appeared. This is the day in which Zion dances with joy.
subcodes.first_line_orig: روزی آمده و زمانی ظاهر شده که انبیای الهی بان وعده داده اند یوم یومی است که صهیون برقص آید
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @predictions and prophecies
